subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant, O sacred bough of the Blessed Tree, His Holiness the Afnán, Áqá Mírzá Áqá, in the utmost spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حضرت افنان سدره مبارکه جناب آقا میرزا آقا در کمال روح و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @firmness in the Covenant
